race.comment: NEARCO FROD (1) resumes as a gelding. He was contesting some strong races last time in, finding the 1600m too sharp fresh at Sandown Hillside before improving sharply to this trip when third to Shockletz which is strong form for this. The camp have gone straight to 2000m this time and he can win fresh. WINSTON (6) is the fit horse, fourth up for this off a strong run over this route last time when just finding one better. He'll roll forward and take catching. MAHERS LANDING (7) is racing consistently without winning this time in, just behind WINSTON when they clashed last time. He's drawn to get back but will be charging late. PARVATI PARTY (10) ran out a dominant winner in easier company second up at Kilmore and has to be respected while ZEYNO (12) is only having her third start and can figure.
